MINI MINUTES: The cause comes on regularly for Small Claims hearing, as assigned by the Dept. of the Presiding Judge on 10/19/09 and continued to 10/20/09, on court's own motion.
Appearances:
Plaintiff Heather Santos present.
Natalie Zavialoff present as representative for defendant Kaiser Permanente.

Plaintiff's exhibits 1 through 5 inclusive, previously marked and reviewed by the Court.

Defendant's exhibits A through C inclusive, previously marked and reviewed by the Court.

The Court hears testimony and takes the matter under submission.

Judge Donald Sullivan, Clerk: V. Mack, Not Reported
